input.content:
================================================================================
                    PROJECT MANAGEMENT TOOL - VERSION 2.0
                           RELEASE NOTES
================================================================================

Release Date: [Current Date]
Version: 2.0.0

================================================================================
                            OVERVIEW
================================================================================

We're excited to announce the release of Project Management Tool v2.0! This 
major release includes significant new features, performance improvements, and 
numerous bug fixes to enhance your project management experience.


================================================================================
                         NEW FEATURES
================================================================================

1. ADVANCED TASK DEPENDENCIES
   - Create complex task dependency chains with multiple relationship types
   - Visual dependency diagram showing task relationships and critical path
   - Automatic deadline propagation based on dependent task schedules
   - Cycle detection to prevent circular dependencies

2. TEAM COLLABORATION ENHANCEMENTS
   - Real-time collaborative commenting on tasks and projects
   - @mention notifications to tag team members directly
   - Thread-based discussions with reply functionality
   - Activity timeline showing all project changes and updates

3. CUSTOM WORKFLOWS
   - Create custom workflow stages tailored to your team's process
   - Drag-and-drop workflow builder with no coding required
   - Conditional workflow transitions based on task properties
   - Workflow automation with trigger-based actions

4. ADVANCED REPORTING & ANALYTICS
   - Interactive dashboards with customizable widgets
   - Burndown and velocity charts for agile teams
   - Resource allocation and capacity planning reports
   - Export reports to PDF, Excel, and CSV formats

5. BUDGET & TIME TRACKING
   - Track project costs and budget allocation
   - Time logging feature for accurate task estimation
   - Financial reports with cost breakdown by team/project
   - Budget vs. actual comparison analytics

6. MOBILE APPLICATION
   - Native iOS and Android applications
   - Full offline support with automatic sync
   - Push notifications for important updates
   - Mobile-optimized task management interface

7. INTEGRATION MARKETPLACE
   - Expanded third-party integrations (Slack, Teams, GitHub, Jira)
   - Webhook support for custom integrations
   - API rate limits increased for enterprise users
   - Pre-built integration templates


================================================================================
                         IMPROVEMENTS
================================================================================

1. PERFORMANCE & SCALABILITY
   - Database optimization reducing load times by up to 40%
   - Improved handling of large projects (10,000+ tasks)
   - Enhanced search functionality with full-text indexing
   - Reduced memory footprint for better server efficiency

2. USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE
   - Redesigned dashboard with cleaner, modern layout
   - Dark mode support for all interface pages
   - Improved navigation with customizable sidebar
   - Better keyboard shortcuts and accessibility features
   - Responsive design for tablets and smaller screens

3. SECURITY & COMPLIANCE
   - Two-factor authentication (2FA) support
   - Single Sign-On (SSO) integration for enterprise users
   - GDPR and CCPA compliance improvements
   - End-to-end encryption for sensitive project data
   - Enhanced audit logging for compliance reporting

4. PROJECT TEMPLATES
   - Expanded library of industry-specific templates
   - Custom template creation and sharing within teams
   - Template versioning and update management
   - Quick-start project setup using templates

5. FILTERING & SEARCH
   - Advanced multi-field filtering with save/load capability
   - Full-text search across all project data
   - Smart search suggestions based on usage patterns
   - Saved search filters for quick access

6. NOTIFICATION SYSTEM
   - Granular notification preferences by project/team
   - Email digest options (immediate, daily, weekly)
   - In-app notification center with filtering
   - Smart notification deduplication

7. BACKUP & DISASTER RECOVERY
   - Automatic daily backups with 30-day retention
   - One-click backup download and restore
   - Disaster recovery SLA for enterprise plans
   - Cross-region replication for high availability


================================================================================
                         BUG FIXES
================================================================================

1. CRITICAL FIXES
   - Fixed critical data loss issue when bulk editing tasks
   - Resolved authentication timeout on long-running sessions
   - Fixed race condition causing duplicate task creation
   - Corrected permission inheritance in nested projects

2. TASK & PROJECT MANAGEMENT
   - Fixed task dates not updating when parent project dates changed
   - Resolved issue with task assignments not sending notifications
   - Fixed recurring task generation skipping some occurrences
   - Corrected milestone completion status calculation

3. USER INTERFACE
   - Fixed missing task details in certain view modes
   - Resolved dropdown menu cutoff on smaller screens
   - Fixed calendar not displaying tasks in some time zones
   - Corrected chart rendering issues in exported PDFs

4. TEAM & PERMISSIONS
   - Fixed team member list not updating after role changes
   - Resolved permission caching issues requiring page refresh
   - Fixed inability to remove members from archived projects
   - Corrected team invitation email delivery issues

5. INTEGRATIONS
   - Fixed Slack integration failing silently on connection errors
   - Resolved GitHub commit linking not working in some cases
   - Fixed API token expiration not properly handled
   - Corrected webhook retry logic for failed deliveries

6. REPORTING
   - Fixed report generation timing out on large datasets
   - Resolved chart data discrepancies in filtered reports
   - Fixed export functionality corrupting special characters
   - Corrected date range filtering in some report types

7. NOTIFICATIONS
   - Fixed duplicate notifications being sent
   - Resolved notification email formatting issues
   - Fixed unread notification counter not updating
   - Corrected notification timestamp in different time zones

8. MISCELLANEOUS
   - Fixed cursor jumping when typing in text fields
   - Resolved intermittent API 500 errors on project creation
   - Fixed incorrect activity log timestamps
   - Corrected memory leak in browser when idle


================================================================================
                      MIGRATION & UPGRADE
================================================================================

Upgrading from v1.x to v2.0 is seamless and requires no manual intervention
for self-hosted deployments. Please follow these steps:

1. Back up your current database before upgrading
2. Stop the application server
3. Deploy the v2.0 release files
4. Database migration will run automatically on first startup
5. Restart the application server

Your existing data will be automatically migrated and remain fully accessible.
No user action is required.

IMPORTANT: Please allow additional time for database migration if your 
project has a large volume of data (100,000+ tasks).


================================================================================
                     SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
================================================================================

MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS:
- Node.js: 14.0 or higher
- Database: PostgreSQL 12+ or MySQL 8.0+
- RAM: 4 GB (8 GB recommended for 1,000+ users)
- Storage: 20 GB SSD recommended
- Browser: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge (latest versions)

MOBILE APP REQUIREMENTS:
- iOS: 12.0 or later
- Android: 7.0 or later


================================================================================
                      DEPRECATIONS & BREAKING CHANGES
================================================================================

1. API CHANGES
   - Legacy v1 API endpoints deprecated (v2 API recommended)
   - Removed deprecated task priority system (replaced with custom fields)
   - Changed authentication token expiration from 30 days to 90 days

2. FEATURE REMOVALS
   - Removed outdated Basecamp integration (use newer alternatives)
   - Discontinued Windows Phone mobile app (use web version)
   - Removed CSV import feature (available via API)

3. DATABASE
   - MySQL 5.7 support discontinued (upgrade to 8.0+)
   - SQLite no longer supported for production deployments


================================================================================
                       KNOWN ISSUES
================================================================================

1. In rare cases, very large dashboards (50+ widgets) may experience
   slight lag when loading. Workaround: Reduce number of widgets or use
   multiple dashboard views.

2. Real-time collaboration may have slight delays (1-2 seconds) for users
   on slower internet connections.

3. Some legacy browsers may not fully support dark mode. Please update
   to the latest version for full compatibility.

4. Bulk operations on projects with 5,000+ tasks may take several minutes
   to complete.


================================================================================
                       SUPPORT & DOCUMENTATION
================================================================================

For detailed documentation and tutorials, visit:
https://docs.projectmanagementtool.com

For support inquiries, contact:
Email: support@projectmanagementtool.com
Support Portal: https://support.projectmanagementtool.com
Community Forum: https://community.projectmanagementtool.com

Feature Requests:
https://feedback.projectmanagementtool.com


================================================================================
                        ACKNOWLEDGMENTS
================================================================================

We would like to thank our community of users and beta testers for their
valuable feedback and contributions that made this release possible. Your
insights have shaped the direction of version 2.0.


================================================================================
                           CONTACT US
================================================================================

Website: https://projectmanagementtool.com
Twitter: @ProjectMgmtTool
Email: contact@projectmanagementtool.com

================================================================================
End of Release Notes - Version 2.0
================================================================================
